codeReview.summary: The fix commit 03ce3d6 successfully wires EgressFilter into all four HTTP clients that were previously identified as missing: VaultClient, OpaPolicyEngine, OpaClient, and SearchClient. All network operations now check is_egress_allowed() before making outbound HTTP requests and return appropriate error messages when egress is denied.

summary: RE-RUN PASS: The fix commit 03ce3d6 properly addresses the prior blocking issue (round 2). All four HTTP clients (VaultClient in vault.rs, OpaPolicyEngine and OpaClient in opa_policy.rs, SearchClient in web_search.rs, and RemoteExecutor in hybrid.rs) now have EgressFilter wired via with_egress_filter() factory methods and is_egress_allowed() checks before each network operation. The implementation fully covers the feature's expectedBehavior: default-deny outbound HTTP filtering with cloud metadata endpoint 169.254.169.254 always blocked regardless of allowlist contents.
